Title: Minimalist Crescent Moon Constellation and Floral Line Art Print
Description:
Embrace the serene magic of the cosmos with this delicate line art print. Featuring an elegantly drawn crescent moon nestled with a delicate floral motif, and accented by detailed constellation charts and scattered celestial stars.

This minimalist design captures the tranquility of the night sky, making it a perfect piece of botanical and cosmic wall decor. The fine, intricate black lines lend a sophisticated, airy feel to any room, style, or aesthetic.

  • Perfect for: Creating a celestial reading nook, bedroom wall art, bohemian living room decor, or office space accent.
  • Design Details: The inclusion of the modern constellation diagram and the simple, graceful flower adds depth and a touch of natural whimsy to the astronomical theme.
  • Material Feel: Printed on high-quality matte paper, the artwork features crisp lines and subtle depth, giving it a gallery-worthy, ethereal feel.

Ideal as a thoughtful gift for stargazers, lovers of astrology, bohemian decorators, or anyone who appreciates subtle, artistic wall decor. Hang it with simple mounting hardware to instantly elevate your space.
